tags.name: B-veggen
tags.note: This crag appears to be unmaintained. Much vegetation below the cliff. Three unbolted/trad routes with one top anchor each, consisting of two stainless steel bolts but with no rings. One anchor is accessible from above without rappelling.
The route has one stainless steel bolt only and also an anchor with rings accessible from the top
The route has one stainless steel bolt only and also an anchor with rings accessible from the top
